title: (Bullish Signal) LMNX, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling LMNX's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor identified 46 similar cases where LMNX's MACD histogram became positive, and 38 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 83%. Current price $37.08 crossed the resistance line at $36.71 and is trading between $37.66 resistance and $36.71 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 03/10/21 - 04/12/21, the price experienced a +22% Uptrend. During the week of 04/05/21 - 04/12/21, the stock enjoyed a +16% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/h3hchqno3zs61.png?width=1522&format=png&auto=webp&s=e4ea87039f594aa0bbb894a791f86e376d1491ce

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on April 08, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on LMNX as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 60 of 83 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 72%.

Following a +14.72% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where LMNX advanced for three days, in 235 of 332 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 71%.
